title: Case-O-Craze
subtitle: To encourage students to explore sustainable methods for a better future by proposing innovative green energy solutions to real-world problems, while promoting critical thinking, creativity, and environment.
description: Case-O-Craze was an idea presentation competition where teams analyzed given problem statements related to sustainability and renewable energy. Participants presented their solutions before judges, focusing on practical, innovative, and impactful green energy approaches. The event encouraged critical thinking and collaborative problem-solving among participants. It also provided a platform for students to showcase their ideas and contribute towards building a more sustainable future.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Problem statement analysis on sustainability themes
Idea presentation in front of judges
Feedback and evaluation based on practicality and innovation
